title: Icon Xaero's
description:
Icon mod for xaero's map and minimap 
Many icon mod
body:
## 13-03-2026 : The next updates to the pack are available and will be announced on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/posts/1-22-142811573). Hope everyone follows - **All Works on all versions from 1.16.5 to 1.21.11 and always updated to the latest versions** ### Supports 1.16.5 -> 1.21.11 **Requirements:** [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - Combine : [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) -> Move to [Icon Fresh](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icon-xaeros-x-freshanimations) - Any of the mods from the lists below. You do not need all of the mods for this pack to work - This pack aims to add icons for mobs from a variety of mods to Xaero's Minimap - The resource pack is compatible with all lower versions, so feel free to add it - This resource pack I will try to update according to the mods that I use the most. If you want to update any mod, please leave it in the comment section.  - Hope everyone can support me through donation
Support mod - [AdventureZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/adventurez) - [Alexscaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) - [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs) - [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae) -
